title: Add missing pin operators to a 3-filter query module
prompt: The `MyApp.Accounts` module in `test_fixtures/missing_pin_filter.ex` has three query functions that each filter by a runtime variable (`email`, `team_id`, `role`) but forget the pin operator `^`. Rewrite the module so every runtime variable is pinned. Preserve function names, arities, and return types exactly. Write your corrected module to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: Single mechanical transformation — add `^` before each runtime variable in a where clause. No prior context required, pattern is well-documented, vanilla Sonnet should one-shot this.
research_citation: oliver-kriska/claude-elixir-phoenix Iron Law: 'Always pinning values with ^ in queries' (most-enforced Claude rule)
